records.heading: Observe operation base commit/current HEAD
records.why: RHP-018.0 starts from the current RHP-017.2 seal.

records.heading: Compile evolution readiness gate and tests
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before evidence sealing.

records.heading: Run focused RHP-018.0 readiness gate tests
records.why: Prove readiness classifications and RHPREADY rendering.

records.heading: Run readiness + loop + evidence API regressions
records.why: Keep loop kernel, compatibility gate, and doctor surfaces aligned.

records.heading: Run RHPREADY command
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.evolution_readiness_gate --repo-root . --candidate-operation-class governance_kernel_update --current-head-ci-status unknown --ci-source operator-provided --allow-dirty --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-018-0-evolution-readiness-gate\readiness-gate-result.json --box-out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-018-0-evolution-readiness-gate\RHPREADY.txt
records.why: Emit boxed readiness decision and machine-readable gate result. During install, bounded operation dirt is allowed so the gate does not inspect the patient during surgery.

records.heading: Run evidence API compatibility gate after readiness install
records.why: Prove latest pointer and final evidence shape remain compatible.

records.heading: Run read-only RHP doctor after readiness install
records.why: Prove cockpit remains read-only and compatible during operation dirt.
